signals.headline: Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][3][4]
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][3][4]

Powell stated on March 18, 2026, during a post-FOMC press conference that if his successor is not confirmed by the end of his chair term on May 15, he would serve as chair pro tem until confirmation, per legal precedent[1][2][3][4]. This addresses uncertainty around nominee Kevin Warsh
